description: Legal record (#85) in a court register/pinqas from a Karaite beit din in Cairo (on f. 29v of Yevr.-Arab. I 328). Dated 6 Heshvan 5325 AM (1564 CE). Debt settlement between spouses in which ʿAbd al-Raḥīm b. David ha-Ḥazan acknowledges a debt of 47 ashrafī jadīd to his wife Sitt al-Ahl bt. Naṣr Ibn ʿAṭṭar. The record has a section that is crossed out, stating that this sum is specified in Sitt al-Ahl's ketubba. The terms of repayment are uncommon, with ʿAbd al-Raḥīm committing to repay the sum on a daily basis with 1 niṣf fiḍḍa/day. Given that the couple is not seeking a divorce, the potential repayment of Sitt al-Ahl's dowry raises the question of whether her husband had misused it in some way (but the exact terms of this debt settlement remain unclear given how much is crossed out). MCD.
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בהספרייה הלאומית רוסיה.
